title: SCBE coding agent Qwen Stage 6 repair v11 (forced-prefix signal shape)
description: v11 retry after v10 gate failed 2/5 (hex_trace + cost_propagation passed; jump_cancel, lane_separation, training_boundary failed on missing required tokens). v9->v10 trend: 1->2 pass, signal-concentration helped. v11 hypothesis: shape, not volume. Adds atomic_workflow_stage6_signal_shape_boost (forced-prefix shards: every response opens with `required-tokens: tok1 | tok2 | ... ::` checklist before prose). Coverage extended to all 5 contract prompts (v9/v10 must_pass_boost only covered 3 of 5). max_steps bumped 100->150 to give forced-prefix shape time to engrain. Inline gate against stage6_atomic_workflow_eval_contract.json blocks any HF push if score < 0.8 or any must_pass prompt fails.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve token-to-binary/hex flow across code, semantic overlay, structural chemistry frame, and resource-aware workflow composition. Keep material chemistry separate from structural chemistry templates, predict resource overruns before commit, and use steady-state fallback plus re-advance when a launch would exceed budget.

evaluation.notes: Must clear the frozen Stage 6 unseen contract via the inline gate (render_uv_training_script in dispatch_coding_agent_hf_job.py). v11 tests the signal-SHAPE hypothesis: every response in signal_shape_boost shards opens with `required-tokens: ... ::` checklist, training the model to enumerate required vocabulary before writing prose. If v11 still fails, v12 will compose forced-prefix with even higher must_pass_boost concentration.
